security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data can be modified in transit without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks integrity checks on vote data during submission.

assumptions: The network connection between the user and the contract is not secured.
The governance contract does not validate the integrity of the vote data received.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks using digital signatures and secure network communication.

description: An attacker might modify vote data during transmission to manipulate the outcome of the proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes may allow actors to deny participation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not maintain a verifiable audit trail of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not store sufficient information to allow tracing votes back to their submitters.
The system lacks mechanisms for non-repudiation.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure and immutable log of all votes cast and their associated metadata.

description: Users could deny that they cast specific votes due to the absence of a robust audit log.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information might be exposed during transit or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect vote confidentiality during transmission or storage.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the contract is vulnerable to eavesdropping.
The contract database storing votes does not protect against unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption for vote transmission and secure storage for vote data.

description: Sensitive voting information might be intercepted or leaked.
